svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="MCP解决M×N" id="mcp1"> <mxGraphModel dx="-659" dy="-107" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="480" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="t1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="传统：每个客户端 × 每个工具，都要写适配（M×N）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="480" x="40" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="Claude Code" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="130" x="60" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="Cursor" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="130" x="60" y="140"
